outcomes.20: Four profiled candidates are nominally cheaper but all fail known data or runtime; the two known-correct candidates both cost 156, equal to baseline.
outcomes.30: Both retained lower-static candidates keep a 51-input Einsum and fail the structural gate; the prior exact-factor/full-history audit found no sound lower factorization.
outcomes.31: All eight retained candidates are known-correct but cost at least 227, equal to baseline; six additional full-history candidates also profile at or above baseline.
outcomes.42: All retained candidates keep a 31-input giant Einsum; every non-giant loose-history model screens at or above cost 217.
outcomes.55: All retained candidates keep a 19-28-input giant Einsum; prior exact-rank and refit work found no known-correct lower-cost standard graph.
outcomes.59: All retained candidates keep an 18-41-input giant Einsum; all structurally valid loose-history models screen at or above cost 156.
outcomes.64: All retained candidates keep a 58-input giant Einsum; all structurally valid loose-history models screen at or above cost 271.

fresh5000_skip_reason: No candidate passed the prerequisite strictly-cheaper plus complete-known plus structural gates.
